word: G662 - ἀποτολμάω - apotolmáō - ap-ot-ol-mah'-o - Be very bold

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀποτολμάω

- Transliteration: Apotolmao

- Phonetic: ap-ot-ol-mah'-o

- Definition:

1. to assume boldness, make bold

- Origin: from G575 and G5111

- TDNT entry: 11:01,1

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G575 and G5111; to venture plainly: - be very bold.
